title: Invoicing - Invoice and Payment Events
description: JSON Schema definitions for Invoicing / Billing domain events published via SNS. Covers invoice lifecycle (create, update, delete) and payment lifecycle (create, update). The Invoicing service uses RDS PostgreSQL for ACID-critical transactional integrity. Invoice status transitions are consumed by Reporting, Notifications, and Workflow services. Cross-domain workflows (invoice creation → inventory update → notification) are orchestrated via Step Functions Saga Pattern.

eventEnvelope.description: Common event envelope shared by all Invoicing domain events. Provides distributed tracing via correlationId and idempotency support for at-least-once delivery guarantees.

eventType.description: Event type identifier following the {domain}.{entity}.{action} naming convention.

correlationId.description: UUID for distributed tracing and request correlation. Enables consumer-side deduplication for idempotent processing.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event was produced.

source.description: Service name that emitted the event. Always 'invoicing' for events in this schema.

data.description: Domain-specific event payload. Structure varies per event type.

invoiceStatusEnum.description: Invoice lifecycle status. Transitions: draft → sent → paid/overdue → cancelled. Status changes are critical business events.

invoiceCreatedEvent.title: Invoice Created Event
invoiceCreatedEvent.description: Published when a new invoice is created in the Invoicing service. Triggers Saga Pattern orchestration: invoice creation → inventory reservation → customer notification via Step Functions.

data.description: Invoice creation payload derived from RecordManager CRUD pattern adapted for the invoicing bounded context.

invoiceId.description: Unique identifier for the invoice record.

invoiceNumber.description: Human-readable invoice number for display and reference (e.g., 'INV-2025-0001').

status.description: Initial invoice status, typically 'draft' at creation time.

customerId.description: Reference to the customer/account in the CRM service. Cross-service reference resolved via API composition.

totalAmount.description: Total invoice amount including all line items, taxes, and adjustments.

dueDate.description: Payment due date in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD).

lineItemCount.description: Number of line items on the invoice.

createdBy.description: User ID of the person who created the invoice. Extracted from JWT claims in the Lambda handler.

invoiceUpdatedEvent.title: Invoice Updated Event
invoiceUpdatedEvent.description: Published when an existing invoice is updated. Status transitions (e.g., draft → sent, sent → paid) are critical events consumed by Reporting for read-model projections and Notifications for customer alerts.

data.description: Invoice update payload with status transition tracking for downstream consumers.

invoiceId.description: Unique identifier for the updated invoice record.

status.description: Current invoice status after the update.

previousStatus.description: Previous invoice status before the update. Enables consumers to react to specific status transitions (e.g., 'sent' → 'paid' triggers payment confirmation notification).

changedFields.description: List of field names that were modified in this update. Enables selective processing by consumers.

updatedBy.description: User ID of the person who performed the update.

invoiceDeletedEvent.title: Invoice Deleted Event
invoiceDeletedEvent.description: Published when an invoice is deleted. Typically restricted to 'draft' status invoices. Consumed by Reporting to remove read-model projections and by Workflow to cancel any pending Saga orchestrations.

data.description: Invoice deletion payload with minimal identifying information.

invoiceId.description: Unique identifier of the deleted invoice record.

invoiceNumber.description: Human-readable invoice number for audit trail purposes.

deletedBy.description: User ID of the person who deleted the invoice.

paymentCreatedEvent.title: Payment Created Event
paymentCreatedEvent.description: Published when a payment is recorded against an invoice. Triggers downstream processing: invoice status may transition to 'paid' if fully settled, Reporting updates payment aggregations, and Notifications sends payment confirmation.

data.description: Payment creation payload linking a payment to its invoice.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment record.

invoiceId.description: Reference to the invoice this payment is applied against.

amount.description: Payment amount in the specified currency.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code matching the invoice currency.

paymentDate.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the payment was received or processed.

createdBy.description: User ID of the person who recorded the payment.

paymentUpdatedEvent.title: Payment Updated Event
paymentUpdatedEvent.description: Published when a payment record is updated (e.g., status correction, amount adjustment, method change). Consumed by Reporting to update payment aggregations and by Notifications if status changes warrant customer communication.

data.description: Payment update payload with changed field tracking.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the updated payment record.

invoiceId.description: Reference to the invoice this payment is applied against.

changedFields.description: List of field names that were modified in this update.

updatedBy.description: User ID of the person who performed the update.

invoiceIssuedEvent.description: Published when an invoice is issued/sent to a customer.

invoicePaidEvent.description: Published when an invoice is marked as paid.

invoiceVoidedEvent.description: Published when an invoice is voided/cancelled.

paymentProcessedEvent.description: Published when a payment is successfully processed.
